title: Autonomous loop execute-safe improvement status refresh after proof v0
problem: Ticket-349 surfaces autonomous_loop_improvement_status in operator autocycle JSON, but execute-safe mode returns pre-run improvement inspection only; after a successful autonomous loop proof the payload should re-read improvement artifacts from the loop report.
acceptance_criteria: After successful execute-safe autonomous loop proof, payload autonomous_loop_improvement_status reflects written improvement artifacts.
Failed or blocked execute-safe runs leave pre-run improvement status unchanged.
No execute-safe command allowlist changes or queue writes.
rollback_plan: Revert post-run improvement re-inspection in execute_safe_checks only.
